clickhouse_password.label: default user 密码
clickhouse_password.help: ClickHouse default 用户密码。留空 = 自动 24 位。生产建议建专用业务账号，default 仅运维用。
clickhouse_password.helpEn: Password for 'default' user. Empty = auto 24 chars. Production: create dedicated business users.

clickhouse_tcp_port.label: TCP 端口（native 协议）
clickhouse_tcp_port.help: clickhouse-client 连接端口。注意：与 Prometheus 9090 接近，避免冲突。
clickhouse_tcp_port.helpEn: clickhouse-client connection port. Note: close to Prometheus 9090, avoid conflicts.

clickhouse_http_port.label: HTTP 端口
clickhouse_http_port.help: REST API 端口。boto3 / Python clickhouse-driver / dbt 等用此。
clickhouse_http_port.helpEn: REST API port. Used by boto3 / Python clickhouse-driver / dbt.

clickhouse_max_memory_gb.label: 单查询最大内存（GB）
clickhouse_max_memory_gb.help: 单查询的内存上限。物理内存的 50-70%。低于 1 GB 大查询会失败。
clickhouse_max_memory_gb.helpEn: Max RAM per query. Recommend 50-70% of physical RAM. Below 1GB will fail large queries.

clickhouse_data_dir.label: 数据目录
clickhouse_data_dir.help: ClickHouse 数据存储位置。生产推荐 NVMe SSD。
clickhouse_data_dir.helpEn: Data storage location. NVMe SSD recommended for production.
